author: codex

deferred_buckets: The broader operated_by entity->entity bucket also contains agency/service hierarchy cases such as NYCT/MTA Bus, Access-A-Ride/Paratransit, and MNR/MTA; those are not exact facility-operator direction fixes and are deferred.
Metric/event and source/publication buckets remain for separate semantic review.
commands_run: git status --short scoped to review notes/submission overrides/submissions/pipeline relation files
rg relation endpoint and previous cleanup artifacts
sed read-only inspection of packages/pipeline/src/records/relations.ts and submissions.ts
bun --eval current canonical relation endpoint-shape bucket inventory using relationEndpointShapeIssue
rg original submission ids in data/submissions
jq raw source block inspection for meeting_doc_186971#p008_c0002
bun --eval original submission/retired guard checks and createSubmissionEntry plus relationEndpointIssues dry run

conductor_apply_plan.mutation_mechanism: retire malformed operated_by entity->entity submissions in data/submission-overrides/retired.json and append accepted same-source operates replacements; do not edit generated canonical JSONL, canonical.db, wiki pages, or source pages
